title: Crafty Candy
short_description: Challenge yourself to thousands of delicious match 3 puzzles with Candice and Cookie through an enchanted land of sweet treats.
description: Challenge yourself to thousands of delicious match 3 puzzles! Join Candice, an apprentice witch, and Cookie, the adorable kitten, through an enchanted land of sweet treats! From marshmallow madness to gooey chocolate waterfalls, discover the tastiest adventure ever!
